question_en: How is Bretton Woods treated here?
choices_en: As a full restoration of sound money
As an unstable compromise that preserved manipulation
As a complete rejection of dollar centrality
explanation_en: Bretton Woods is portrayed as a compromise that still left room for manipulation.
explanation_ko: 브레턴우즈는 여전히 조작의 공간을 남긴 절충안으로 묘사된다.
